name: hydraide
description: HydrAIDE Claude Code plugin marketplace. Installs the hydraide plugin which bundles three skills (hydraidego for the Go SDK, hydraidectl for server operations, and hydraide as a concept-doc router) plus three slash commands (/hydraide-new-model, /hydraide-review, /hydraide-debug).

plugins.name: hydraide
plugins.description: Build, operate, and learn HydrAIDE with Claude Code. Bundles the hydraidego (Go SDK), hydraidectl (server operations), and hydraide (concepts router) skills, plus interactive slash commands for model generation, code review, and debugging.
